paper.title: PPT-Eval: A Benchmark for Computer-Use Agents on PowerPoint Tasks

checks: The downloaded object is a readable PDF 1.7 document; pdfinfo reports 41 pages and the embedded PPT-Eval title and authors.

The 174086-byte layout-preserving extraction is non-empty and readable from title and abstract through references, the appendix contents, benchmark curation, human-rubric agreement examples, agent material, and the final page.
Sampled extraction locations include the 120-task claim, rubric and human-meta-evaluation discussion, Appendix B disagreement examples, and the final verification guidance.
The arXiv API entry is immutable v1, reports publication and update on 2026-06-30, and its summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.
warnings: Layout extraction preserves body text and tables but cannot preserve all visual information from presentation screenshots and rubric diagrams; use the PDF for image-dependent claims.

official_release.timing_boundary: The pinned commit was committed eight days after arXiv v1. It is the queued, paper-linked audit target but must be treated as a post-v1 release rather than exact paper-time code.
acquisition_findings: The pinned archive is readable and contains 255 files totaling 2967260 uncompressed bytes.
task_registry/tasks.json contains 120 task records, and task_registry/rubrics contains 120 JSON rubric files.
The pinned tree contains a LICENSE file and GitHub identifies the repository license as MIT.
No PPTX source decks are included in the pinned tree; source hydration, rights, normalization behavior, and URL permanence remain deep-review questions.
No deep code, task-bank, human-record, or result audit was performed during acquisition.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded the real immutable arXiv v1 PDF, extracted layout-preserving full text, verified complete manuscript coverage, and preserved the queued official repository commit with metadata. This is source acquisition and extraction verification, not a deep paper/release review, benchmark replay, paper-table reconstruction, or evidence of rubric validity, professional presentation quality, configured-agent capability, or readiness.
review_handoff: Read the immutable PDF and full text and audit the pinned post-v1 release. Inspect all 120 task and rubric records; source-deck URL/hydration and PowerPoint Online normalization; native/diff/rendered/VLM evidence views; criterion dependencies, weights, applicability, alternatives, collateral changes and aesthetics; environment/configuration identity; human labels and agreement; invalid/retry denominators, costs, raw results, and paper/release conformance. Preserve the post-v1 timing boundary and do not infer professional quality or readiness from rubric scores or correlation alone.
local_storage_note: The PDF, release archive, and extracted repository are ignored local evidence. The full-text extraction, arXiv metadata, GitHub metadata, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are intended for version control; re-fetch ignored artifacts from recorded immutable URLs and verify SHA-256 if absent.
